subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Upon thee be My glory! We testify that We have made mention of thee aforetime through verses from whose every letter there shone forth the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک بهائی نشهد انا ذکرناک من قبل بآیات لاحت من افق کل حرف منها
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for assistance; intercession
